name: Nanjing Hanrui Cobalt Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Hanrui Cobalt Co.,Ltd. engages in the extraction of cobalt and copper ores. The company is also involved in the smelting, research and development, production, and sale of cobalt powder and other cobalt-based powder. Its products include cobalt metal powder, cobalt concentrates, cobalt hydroxide, cobalt salts, copper cathode, etc. The company sells its products in China, South Korea, Japan, Germany, Switzerland, Israel, India, and the United States. Nanjing Hanrui Cobalt Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
